events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: blowout evidence indicates the formwork failed to resist lateral concrete pressure — a defect against ACI 347 tie/bracing guidance, not just an appearance issue. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, `component_conditions: ["installed-defective"]`, at 70% complete, with corrective actions (halt placement, re-brace, correct tie spacing, repair blown panels, re-inspect before continuing).
